name: Maya Tau
description: Maya Tau is the oldest child of Aran Tau, born April 15, 1906. She took interest in the navy since childhood and enlisted in the Antares Armada in 1929, at the age of 23. Aran disliked the thought of his daughter going off into combat but took it as an opportunity to solidify the navy’s loyalty to him. As Maya rose up the ranks, she became more egotistical, believing that she was intellectually superior to the lower ranks, and even to soldiers of her own rank. Maya attained the rank of Kommander in 1936 after a great victory in the Annulus Sea. A few years after, she was promoted to Kaptain. In 1938 she became a casualty in a skirmish in the Annulus Sea.
creator: Blood&iron
